decisions.decision: Direction B hybrid palette for design system
decisions.rationale: Brand guide compliance — achromatic base, semantic accents only, monospace timestamps from Direction A, 1.75 line-height from Direction C

decisions.decision: Config.ts uses graceful fallback instead of throwing
decisions.rationale: Throwing at module load time crashes the entire page if env vars missing — fallback lets the page render and webhook calls fail with clear network errors instead
91 well-structured commits with clear messages — valuable for portfolio piece
Design plan says safe path (Approve) must be visually dominant, Override deliberately de-emphasized
